summary: Develop backend services for business applications while contributing to internal AI initiatives involving large-scale computer vision datasets.
responsibilities: Develop backend services using Go, GORM, PostgreSQL, and Redis for business applications.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design scalable REST APIs and relational database architectures.
Contribute to internal computer vision initiatives through large-scale aerial imagery dataset preparation and annotation using YOLOv8 workflows.
Support AI development by improving dataset quality and evaluation readiness for location intelligence systems.

summary: Built backend systems for multiple business applications using Go while collaborating within Agile development teams.
responsibilities: Designed relational database schemas and developed 50+ RESTful API endpoints for multiple production-oriented business systems.
Implemented authentication, JWT authorization, RBAC, pagination, and modular CRUD services using Go, Gin, GORM, and PostgreSQL.
Collaborated in Agile development through sprint planning, daily stand-ups, weekly reviews, Git-based workflows, and code reviews.
Optimized backend performance using Redis caching while contributing to scalable and maintainable application architecture.

summary: Developed the backend architecture of a school information system from scratch during an internship program.
responsibilities: Designed the relational database schema and developed backend services for a school information system using Go Fiber and PostgreSQL.
Implemented authentication, JWT authorization, RBAC, attendance management, class management, subject management, and daily learning journal modules.
Built 50+ RESTful API endpoints following clean API design principles to support future frontend and mobile integration.
Collaborated closely with teammates throughout system analysis, database design, implementation, and API testing.
